Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -e "
SELECT cf.name, cfi.value, COUNT\(*\) as cnt
FROM custom_field_issues cfi
JOIN custom_field cf ON cf.id = cfi.field_id
WHERE cf.name = '复测次数'
GROUP BY cfi.value
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -e "
UPDATE custom_field_issues cfi
JOIN custom_field cf ON cf.id = cfi.field_id
SET cfi.value = TRIM\(BOTH '\\"' FROM cfi.value\)
WHERE cf.name = '复测次数'
  AND cfi.value LIKE '\\"%\\"';
SELECT ROW_COUNT\(\) AS updated_rows;
")

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -e "
SELECT id, name, type, options, required, global
FROM custom_field
WHERE name = '复测次数'
LIMIT 5;
" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -se "SELECT id, name, type FROM custom_field WHERE name = '复测次数';" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -se "
SELECT cfi.value, i.create_time, i.update_time
FROM custom_field_issues cfi
JOIN custom_field cf ON cf.id = cfi.field_id
JOIN issues i ON i.id = cfi.resource_id
WHERE cf.name = '复测次数' AND cfi.value LIKE '\\"%\\"';" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -se "
SELECT cfi.value, i.id, i.num, i.platform, i.create_time, i.update_time, i.creator
FROM custom_field_issues cfi
JOIN custom_field cf ON cf.id = cfi.field_id
JOIN issues i ON i.id = cfi.resource_id
WHERE cf.name = '复测次数'
ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
LIMIT 20;" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev -se "
SELECT icl.issue_id, icl.create_time, icl.operator, icl.source,
       icld.field_name, icld.old_value, icld.new_value
FROM issue_change_log icl
JOIN issue_change_log_detail icld ON icld.change_log_id = icl.id
WHERE icld.field_name = '复测次数'
ORDER BY icl.create_time DESC
LIMIT 20;" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev 2>/dev/null <<'SQL'
SELECT icl.issue_id, icl.create_time, icl.operator, icl.source,
       icld.field_name, icld.old_value, icld.new_value
FROM issue_change_log icl
JOIN issue_change_log_detail icld ON icld.change_log_id = icl.id
WHERE icld.field_name = '复测次数'
ORDER BY icl.create_time DESC
LIMIT 20;
SQL)
Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev 2>/dev/null -e "desc issue_change_log; desc issue_change_log_detail;")

Bash(mysql -h 10.90.87.254 -P 3306 -u root -pPassword123@mysql metersphere_dev 2>/dev/null -e "
SELECT icl.issue_id, icl.create_time, icl.operator_name, icl.source,
       icld.field_name, icld.old_value, icld.new_value
FROM issue_change_log icl
JOIN issue_change_log_detail icld ON icld.log_id = icl.id
WHERE icld.field_name = '复测次数'
ORDER BY icl.create_time DESC
LIMIT 20;")
